topic.what: Control-plane architecture for mediating LLM agent execution authority
topic.how: SAL intercepts model outputs as intent proposals, validates against policy and system state via obfuscation membrane and consistency checks, then executes via scoped IAM tokens with cryptographic evidence chaining
topic.why_matters: Stochastic LLM agents can issue unsafe mutations; current architectures grant direct execution authority without validation, creating safety risk in production infrastructure

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of adversarial unsafe intents prevented from executing
characteristics.vs_baseline: vs 0% blocking in traditional direct-execution paradigms
characteristics.evidence: 2,325 blocked at Epolicy=0 plus 175 blocked at Econsistency=0 out of 2,500 adversarial intents
characteristics.context: Benchmark with Nunsafe=2,500 adversarial and Nvalid=7,500 benign intents

characteristics.what_it_measures: Rate of unsafe intent detection at stateless rule-based policy layer
characteristics.vs_baseline: vs no policy enforcement in traditional architectures
characteristics.evidence: 2,325 of 2,500 adversarial intents blocked at Epolicy evaluation
characteristics.context: OPA policy engine evaluating infrastructure mutation rules

characteristics.what_it_measures: Rate of semantic contradiction detection among policy-compliant intents
characteristics.vs_baseline: vs no consistency validation in prior approaches
characteristics.evidence: 175 remaining adversarial intents rejected at Econsistency=0
characteristics.context: Contextual consistency evaluation against real-time telemetry

characteristics.what_itasures: Median end-to-end latency added by control-plane mediation
characteristics.vs_baseline: vs zero overhead in direct execution
characteristics.evidence: Monotonic clock profiling across 10,000 traces; 95th percentile 21.7 ms
characteristics.context: AWS c6g.2xlarge testbed; breakdown: de-obfuscation 2.1ms, OPA 6.8ms, consistency 2.3ms, hashing 1.2ms

characteristics.what_it_measures: Accuracy of deterministic reconstruction from evidence chain
characteristics.vs_baseline: vs no replay capability in traditional systems
characteristics.evidence: All 7,500 benign executions verified via Replay(Ct) = aexec,t
characteristics.context: SHA-256 cryptographic chaining; isolated verification script reconstruction

characteristics.what_itasures: Information-theoretic isolation between identifying state and model inputs
characteristics.vs_baseline: vs full context leakage in traditional architectures
characteristics.evidence: Formal proof via Lemma 1 using Shannon mutual information constraint
characteristics.context: Obfuscation membrane Π:S→ˆS with zero mutual information requirement
